incidents.notes: 7 Informatica jobs failed. 3 unscheduled. 24 files stuck in transit. ELK alert fired at 05:11. Downstream systems at risk: Oracle EBS, Salesforce, Pearlchain, OAS. ZeroOps auto-recovery executing.
incidents.desc: Informatica integration jobs failed — outbound batch status corrupt, inbound files stuck in transit. All downstream data flows at risk. ZeroOps auto-restart in progress.

intel.rootCause: Upstream source system sent unexpected null field causing Informatica parse failure. Jobs aborted without auto-recovery. Transit files not automatically moved to landing directory.
causalChain: Transit files stuck — landing not triggered
intel.recommendation: Auto-restart jobs, reset batch status, move transit files — eliminates 4-6h manual TAM dependency

signals.v: 7 IICS jobs in FAILED state > 10 min — staging pipeline halted
Informatica pod CPU spike 94% — worker thread exhaustion
Data feed > 2h stale — SLA breach on analytics layer
24 transit files stuck in staging directory — downstream blocked
31 OEM + ELK alerts correlated → 1 incident (P1)

incidents.svc: Oracle EBS — Ship Confirmation Stuck (38 orders)
incidents.notes: 38 orders stuck in Shipped/Awaiting Closure. WSH concurrent requests failing. Inventory interface pending transactions. Revenue recognition blocked. ZeroOps auto-resolved 32, finance sign-off for 6 DB fixes. MTTR 28 min vs 3-4h manual.
incidents.desc: Oracle EBS ship confirmation stuck — MTL_TRANSACTIONS_INTERFACE records not clearing. 38 orders unable to close. Revenue booking delayed. ZeroOps resolved with one finance HiTL gate.

intel.rootCause: MTL_TRANSACTIONS_INTERFACE records stuck — inventory interface transactions not processing. 32 orders resolved via WSHFSTRX concurrent reprocessing. 6 required DB-level fix with DBA approval.
intel.recommendation: Daily auto-scan of WSH concurrent queue — auto-reprocess eligible stuck orders before finance team notices

signals.v: MTL_TRANSACTIONS_INTERFACE pending rows > 500 — ship confirm stalled
WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS status = PICKED not progressing — 38 orders
EBS concurrent request queue depth 87% — worker saturation
Ship Confirm worker process stalled 22 min — no progress
14 OEM alerts correlated → 1 incident — revenue impact flagged

incidents.svc: Oracle EBS — Direct Debit Auth Failure
incidents.notes: 284 invoices not picked in DD authorisation run. Bank mandate expired for 31 customers. AR team reversing receipts. Canon IT correcting mandate. Accenture rerun scheduled.
incidents.desc: Direct Debit authorisation failing — bank mandate issue causing invoices not to be picked. Collection delay risk for current period. ZeroOps auto-remediation executing.

intel.rootCause: Bank direct debit mandate expired for 31 customers. Oracle AR DD authorisation run cannot pick invoices without valid mandate. Manual process requires AR reversal, Canon IT backend fix, and 1-week Accenture rerun window.
causalChain: DD auth run executes — invoices not picked
intel.recommendation: Pre-DD mandate validation scan — detect and flag expiring mandates 5 days before next run

signals.v: AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES mandate_status = EXPIRED — 31 customer records
DD pre-run validation — 284 invoices not selected for collection
CE_AUTO_BANK_CLEAR batch job failed — exit code 1
Bank account validation errors spiking — Accenture DD batch
14 OEM finance alerts correlated → 1 P2 incident

incidents.notes: 12 invoices failed delivery — header amount and line sum mismatch. ZeroOps auto-validated header/line totals, corrected 9 within tolerance threshold, flagged 3 for NSO SPOC review. MTTR 2h vs 1-2 business days.
incidents.desc: Informatica delivered 12 invoices to Primavera with header/line amount mismatches. Auto-correction applied for 9 within tolerance. 3 flagged for manual NSO review.

intel.rootCause: Informatica data transformation rounding error causing header total to differ from sum of line amounts. Primavera rejects on strict validation. 9 within correction tolerance, 3 require NSO review.
intel.recommendation: Pre-delivery validation in Informatica — catch mismatch before sending to Primavera

signals.v: Primavera invoice delivery errors — 12 invoices undelivered to NSO
Primavera integration pod restarted 3× in 15 min
PA_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTIONS header validation failed
SMTP delivery timeout — NSO endpoint unreachable 8 min
Primavera revenue recognition data gap detected in OAS

incidents.svc: OAS — Report Data Stale (Informatica feed delay)
incidents.notes: OAS business intelligence reports showing stale data — upstream Informatica feed delayed 3 hours. ZeroOps detected feed lag, triggered Informatica job restart, OAS cache refreshed. Reports updated within 45 min.
incidents.desc: OAS dashboards showing stale supply chain and finance data. Informatica EBS-to-OAS feed delayed by 3 hours. Auto-recovery triggered before business users raised tickets.

intel.rootCause: Informatica EBS→OAS feed job delayed due to upstream EBS job queue congestion. OAS cache not refreshed. Business users would have noticed stale reports at 08:00.
intel.recommendation: ZeroOps monitors Informatica→OAS feed freshness — auto-trigger on 2h lag threshold

signals.v: Report data > 2h stale — SLA threshold breached
Informatica→OAS feed last successful run 3h 14m ago
OAS cache invalidation job not triggered — scheduler missed
OAS Analytics Server — stale dimension tables flagged
Linked to Informatica job failure 65501787 as downstream impact
